rationale.R1.1: The artifact claims uniform state-of-the-art performance, which may be an overstatement and requires reframing.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact reports a regression in SMAP and WADI datasets, which needs to be addressed in the evidence-claim alignment.
rationale.R1.4: The novelty positioning is questionable given the regressions on some benchmarks, requiring a more nuanced comparison with prior work.
